home.heroTitle: A quick fix to your problem

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collectText: Phone number, task description, and budget — only what you enter yourself.
privacy.retentionText: 7 days. After that, data is automatically deleted.
privacy.sharingText: We do not share your data with third parties.
privacy.deleteText: Click the "Delete" button on your listing card.
